Title: User can log in to the application
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Tap on the login button
3. Enter the valid username and password
4. Tap on the login button again
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged into the application and redirected to the home screen.

Title: User can view their profile
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the profile icon
2. Verify that the profile details are displayed correctly
Expected Result: The user's profile details are shown on the screen.

Title: User can add a new schedule
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the schedule icon
2. Tap on the 'Add Schedule' button
3. Enter the new schedule details
4. Tap on the 'Save' button
Expected Result: The new schedule is added to the user's list of schedules.

Title: User can select preferred transport mode
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Preferred transport mode (e.g., bus, train, car)
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the transport icon
2. Select the preferred transport mode
3. Save the selection
Expected Result: The selected transport mode is saved in the user's profile.

Title: Application sends notification for schedule changes
Preconditions: User is logged in and has set up notifications
Test Steps:
1. Update the user's schedule
2. Wait for a notification
Expected Result: A notification is received informing the user of the schedule change.

Title: User can report an error in travel time estimation
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Description of the error and estimated travel time
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the report icon
2. Enter the description of the error and estimated travel time
3. Submit the report
Expected Result: The error report is submitted and stored in the system.

Title: User can manage account settings
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the account settings icon
2. Enter the new email address and password
3. Save the changes
Expected Result:
The user's account settings are updated and saved.

Title: User Account Creation
Preconditions: The user has installed the app on their device.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for the first time.
2. Enter email and password.
3. Confirm the password by re-entering it.
4. Click on the link sent to the email address to verify ownership.
5. Complete the registration process.
Expected Result: The user's account is registered in the database, and they gain access to the application and its functionalities.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: The user has installed the app on their device and created an account previously.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application for the first time.
2. Enter the email and password corresponding to the account.
3. Click the 'Login' button.
4. If the user does not have an account, they can register.
Expected Result: The user is authenticated and can access the application.

Title: Calendar Display
Preconditions: The user has logged into their account.
Test Steps: 1. Tap the calendar button.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the calendar page.

Title: View Schedule
Preconditions: The user has logged into their account and navigated to the calendar page.
Test Steps: 1. No action required.
Expected Result: The user can view the schedule they have entered for class times.

Title: Modify Schedule
Preconditions: The user has logged into their account and navigated to the calendar page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap the "Modify Schedule" button.
2. Remove courses not attended or add new ones.
3. Confirm changes with the appropriate button or cancel them.
Expected Result: If changes are made, they are saved; otherwise, no changes are applied.

Title: Train Schedule Display
Preconditions: The user has logged into their account and navigated to the calendar page.
Test Steps: 1. No action required.
Expected Result: The user sees the train schedule displayed according to their current schedule.

Title: Access Variations Page
Preconditions: The user has logged into their account.
Test Steps: 1. Tap the button to access the variations page.
Expected Result: The user can view information about transportation variations.

Title: View Transportation Variations
Preconditions: The user has logged into their account.
Test Steps: 1. No action required.
Expected Result: The user can view the list of transportation variations.

Title: Access Reports Page
Preconditions: The user has logged into their account.
Test Steps: 1. Tap the button to access the reports page.
Expected Result: The user is presented with a list of existing reports and the option to create new ones.

Title: Create Report
Preconditions: The user has logged into their account and navigated to the reports page.
Test Steps:
1. Select the option to create a report.
2. Describe the issue, providing details and the type of report.
3. Confirm and send the report.
Expected Result: The report is saved and stored in the database.

Title: View Reports
Preconditions: The user has logged into their account and navigated to the reports page.
Test Steps: 1. Tap the button to view the reports.
Expected Result:
The user can view the list of existing reports. <|user|>

PROJECT OVERVIEW:
A software application for managing user accounts, logging in, viewing and modifying schedules, accessing transportation variations, and reporting issues. The application supports calendar management, including adding, removing, and modifying schedule entries, as well as viewing train schedules and handling user feedback through reports.
---------------------------
TEST CASES
---------------------------

Title: View Train Schedules
Preconditions: The user has logged into their account and navigated to the calendar page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap the "Train Schedule" button.
2. Scroll left or right to view the train schedules for previous or next days.
Expected Result: The user can see the correct train schedule based on their current schedule, and scrolling shows the schedules for the previous or next day.

Title: Visualizzazione profilo
Preconditions: L’utente deve aver effettuato l’accesso al proprio account.
Test Steps:
1. L’utente seleziona l’apposita opzione presente nella schermata principale.
2. L’utente trova i dettagli in riferimento al proprio profilo.
Expected Result: L’utente visualizza le proprie informazioni inserite nell’applicativo.

Title: Modifica impostazioni profilo
Preconditions: L’utente deve aver effettuato l’accesso al proprio account.
Test Steps:
1. L’utente seleziona l’opzione presente nell’apposita sezione.
2. L’utente rimuove la sede inserita e seleziona una differente.
3. Se vuole mantenere le modifiche, l’utente conferma con l’apposito pulsante.
4. Se non vuole mantenere le modifiche, l’utente annulla le modifiche.
Expected Result: Se l’utente ha effettuato modifiche, queste sono durature altrimenti nulla è stato modificato.

Title: Inserimento/Modifica orario di frequenza
Preconditions: L’utente deve aver effettuato l’accesso al proprio account.
Test Steps:
1. L’utente registra i propri orari scolastici/lavorativi.
2. L’utente modifica i propri orari nel caso questi varino.
Expected Result: I successivi calcoli dei mezzi di trasporto terranno conto delle nuove informazioni inserite.

Title: Notifica
Preconditions: L’utente deve aver effettuato l’accesso.
Test Steps: 1. Variazione dell'orario di un mezzo (es. se in orario oppure in ritardo).
Expected Result: L’utente riceve una notifica a schermo che comunica la variazione, la quale influisce sul suo trasporto e sul mezzo che essa riguarda.

Title: Logout
Preconditions: L’utente deve aver effettuato l’accesso e trovarsi nella pagina “visualizzazione profilo”.
Test Steps: 1. L’utente preme il pulsante per poter effettuare il logout.
Expected Result: Il token viene invalidato e in seguito rimosso dal database. L’utente trova la schermata di login.

Title: Creazione account
Preconditions: None
Test Steps: 1. L’utente crea un account personale se non ne possiede già uno.
Expected Result: L’utente può accedere alla propria area riservata tramite le credenziali di accesso create.

Title: Login
Preconditions: L’utente deve aver effettuato l’accesso e trovarsi nella pagina “visualizzazione profilo”.
Test Steps: 1. L’utente accede alla propria area riservata tramite le credenziali di accesso create durante la realizzazione dell’account.
Expected Result: Le informazioni che l’utente inserirà vengono salvate e collegate al suo account.

2. Request travel time calculation.
3. Verify the calculated travel time is displayed.
Expected Result: Travel time to the train station is correctly calculated and displayed.

Expected Result: User's schedule and train selections are correctly displayed.

Title: Allow user to view complaints

Title: Provide alternative travel options

Title: Display train variations

Test Steps:
1. Access the complaints section.

PROJECT OVERVIEW:
A software application designed to help users plan their daily transportation, specifically train travel. The app calculates travel times to train stations, suggests train routes based on user's schedule, allows users to save preferred trains, and provides notifications for schedule changes. Users can also report issues with transportation and view their profile and saved data.
---------------------------
TEST CASES
---------------------------
